legacy.analysis:
The run failed before producing a valid metric. The immediate cause is that `density_oof` was built by concatenation into an already indexed DataFrame, which doubled its row count and later caused `balanced_accuracy_score` to see 577,347 targets vs. 1,154,694 predictions. Fix by assigning fold outputs back into a preallocated OOF frame (or concatenating from an actually empty frame) so `train_aug` stays the same length as `y`.

Submission validation failed: stale working/submission.csv from before this node execution

args: Found input variables with inconsistent numbers of samples: [577347, 1154694]
